summary: All 4 files in shared/design-references/ pass acceptance criteria. design-tokens.md, color-psychology.md, and color-principles.md are byte-for-byte identical to their originals (skills/like-figma/references/design-tokens.md and work/design-pipeline/references/ respectively). library-catalog.md is a well-structured catalog containing 8 icon libraries, 3 UI component libraries, and 3 illustration libraries — each entry includes name, URL, license, style description, and use-cases. No assets are stored, only links and descriptions. The directory shared/design-references/ exists and all 4 files are non-empty.
